title: orthandra schweinfurthii
intro: Orthandra schweinfurthii, also known as the "African water lily," is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Orthandra schweinfurthii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
